sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n51046" key="i)soke/falos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰσο-κέφᾰλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n51046.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">like-headed</tr_>, dub. in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ibyc.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
